sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11650" key="a)pau/chsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπαύξησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n11650.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">decrease</tr_>: hence, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">disesteem,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πίπτειν εἰς ἀ.</foreign> Longin <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
